nuggets.text: Descript Free includes 60 minutes of media per month, 100 one-time AI credits, and 720p watermark-free export.
Hobbyist includes 10 media hours per month, 400 AI credits per month, and 1080p watermark-free export.
Creator adds 30 media hours plus 5 bonus hours, 800 monthly AI credits plus 500 bonus credits, and 4K watermark-free export.
Business adds 40 media hours plus 10 bonus hours, 1500 monthly AI credits plus 1000 bonus credits, Brand Studio, and priority support.
Paid tiers expose Underlord, Studio Sound, Remove Filler Words, Create Clips, AI speech, and Regenerate, while Free lists only limited use.
Creator also adds full access to Underlord, 20+ more AI tools, the latest AI video models, and an unlimited royalty-free stock media library.
Descript's product page positions the core workflow as instant transcription followed by editing the media by editing the text.
The feature page highlights Studio Sound, Remove Filler Words, captions, translation, avatars, Quick Design, and generated B-roll as built-in AI tools.
Remote recording supports up to 10 room participants on all listed tiers, with monthly recording hours increasing from 2 to 25 hours depending on plan.
The pricing FAQ says you do not need a credit card to try Descript's Free plan, and the same page states the company is SOC 2 Type II compliant.
